<div class="page-content ">
<h2>Climbs</h2>
<div class=""><div class="">
<div class="fs14">Overview of all categorised climbs in Tour de France 2021.</div>
</div>

<div class="mt50">
<h4>Hardest</h4><div class="fs14">For each climb we compute the climb profileScore. Instead of the average steepness, the climb profileScore looks at each 200 meter segment in the climb. </div>
</div>
<div class="">
<table class=" basic" style="max-width: 650px; "><thead><tr>
<th class="w8 ">#</th>
<th class="w33 ">Climb</th>
<th class="w17 ">Stage</th>
<th class="w8 ">Steepness (%)</th>
<th class="w8 ">Length (km)</th>
<th class="w25 ">profileScore</th>
</tr></thead><tbody>
<tr class=""><td>1</td><td><a href="location/mont-ventoux">Mont Ventoux</a></td><td><a href="race/tour-de-france/2021/stage-11">Stage 11</a></td><td>7.5</td><td>15.8</td><td><div class="valuebar"><div class="w80 bg magenta3 left"></div><div class="title l80">306</div></div></td></tr>
<tr class=""><td>2</td><td><a href="location/col-du-tourmalet">Col du Tourmalet</a></td><td><a href="race/tour-de-france/2021/stage-18">Stage 18</a></td><td>7.4</td><td>17</td><td><div class="valuebar"><div class="w69 bg magenta3 left"></div><div class="title l69">262.6</div></div></td></tr>
